recentReports.title: 10 Products Found - Test Run
recentReports.summary: Top find: USB Portable Blender (#1) - $35-45 price point, 50-55% margins, proven by BlendJet's 10M+ unit success. All 10 products are evergreen, solve meaningful problems, fit shoebox size.

products.name: USB Rechargeable Portable Blender
products.problem: Busy people can't make healthy smoothies on-the-go. Bulky blenders need power outlets. Instant fresh juice anywhere in 30 seconds.

products.name: 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Station with Night Light
products.problem: Desk clutter from multiple charging cables + need for bedside ambient lighting. Charges phone, watch, earbuds simultaneously.

products.name: LED Teeth Whitening Kit with Light
products.problem: Professional teeth whitening costs $300-600. This provides professional-grade results at home in 15-30 minutes.

products.name: Heatless Silk Hair Curler Set
products.problem: Heat styling damages hair over time. This provides beautiful curls overnight WITHOUT heat damage.

products.name: Electric Octopus Claw Scalp Massager
products.problem: Stress, headaches, and poor circulation cause scalp tension. Instant relaxation and stress relief in 5 minutes.

products.name: Smart Posture Corrector with Sensor
products.problem: Remote work epidemic of back pain. Provides instant posture feedback and trains muscle memory.

products.name: Red Light Therapy Sleep Lamp (670nm)
products.problem: Blue light disrupts melatonin. Red light promotes natural melatonin production for better sleep.

products.name: White Noise Sound Machine with Night Light
products.problem: Noisy environments disrupt sleep for babies and adults. Instant auditory environment control.

products.name: Silicone Ice Face Roller Massager
products.problem: Morning puffiness, inflammation. Instant de-puffing and skin tightening in 2-3 minutes.

products.name: Adjustable Breathing Necklace (Anxiety Relief)
products.problem: Anxiety, panic attacks. Personal breathing coach around your neck for discreet relief.

topProduct.name: USB Rechargeable Portable Blender
topProduct.why: Proven 10M+ unit success (BlendJet), instant gratification, content marketing gold, 50-55% margins

recentReports.title: Ad Intelligence Report
recentReports.summary: Found 10 winning ad patterns, 5 trending products, and 3 contrarian angles. Top hook: 'Stop waking up like your house is on fire' for alarm clock products.
hooks: The real reason you can't [achieve goal]
Why your [common solution] is actually making it worse
The [adjective] [product] that [target audience] are obsessed with
recentReports.details:
Top Trending Products:
1. Sunrise alarm clocks - 340% search increase
2. Under desk treadmills - work-from-home fitness
3. Cold plunge tubs - recovery trend
4. Mushroom coffee - focus/productivity
5. Smart water bottles - hydration tracking

Winning Creative Angles:
- Problem-solution demo (first 3 seconds critical)
- Before/after with timestamps
- UGC testimonial with specific results
- 'Day in the life' format
- Expert authority positioning
